misc.title: [#ONEPIECE1181] So to further go in detail about the word nemesis and the name for the sword that Oda has chosen for imu sword. Most people just see the word nemesis & think about archenemy. But actua
misc.text: [#ONEPIECE1181] So to further go in detail about the word nemesis and the name for the sword that Oda has chosen for imu sword. Most people just see the word nemesis & think about archenemy. But actually in Greek myth, the goddess nemesis represented what is the divine balance & retribution justice!! Imu has created a system that is build on justice throughout the marines & within the inner circle with him,gorosei & holy knights, they represent balance when the world is dealing with situations that effect them. So Imu is basically a sword of justice,balance & to spite those that are hubris aka prideful.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1181 Imu's sword Nemesis epithet is "Blade heavenly divine punishment". 🔥🔥🔥
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1181 Imu's sword Nemesis epithet is "Blade heavenly divine punishment". 🔥🔥🔥

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1181 I started off in this community doing political analysis recognizing the anarchist themes throughout the story, I chose the name Yahweh_Theories as I theorized a God like character would
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1181 I started off in this community doing political analysis recognizing the anarchist themes throughout the story, I chose the name Yahweh_Theories as I theorized a God like character would exist as an antithesis to these ideals Now we're here I leave this quote WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1181 We see Imu and Joyboy laughing together, and Imu tells him that domination is what brings peace to the world. — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/2046909233518477583#m
